text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki has managed to leave quite a mark on
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I mull over my complicated feelings as I walk to
my office one rest day.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Welcome back, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm surprised to see Fuji Kiseki since we don't
have a meeting scheduled for today. I wonder if
she needs something.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I was just practicing some magic tricks!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I like practicing here because it calms me, and I
feel like I won't mess up.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure why, but maybe it's because my body
remembers what it feels like to train in here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I think about how Fuji Kiseki has found a
safe space in this room, a faint sense of happiness
bubbles up in me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, since you're back, I should wrap up my
practice session!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Now that you're here, it's show time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She bows her head formally.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to Fuji Kiseki's magic show! Let yourself
be guided to a world of magic and wonder!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
As you see, there are no tricks up my sleeve, and
this is no more than a simple coin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shows me the coin and passes it expertly
between her hands.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now, I'll make it disappear into thin air! Don't
blink or you'll miss it! Three, two, one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ping!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She flicks the coin in the air, and I watch it whirl
with intense force until, suddenly, it disappears!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Yesss!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much! I hope you enjoyed that!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Now, for my next trick...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes out a deck of cards for her next act,
but I'm still caught up on her little exclamation of
triumph.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the three years I've known her, Fuji Kiseki has
always played the role of "Fuji Kiseki."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's extremely rare for her mask to slip and her
true feelings to peek out.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Now, please select one card from... Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, dear... Did you hear that earlier?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That trick is really difficult. I don't often pull it
off.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I thought that if I practiced as if I was in front of a
real audience, I might get the hang of it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And just as I thought, it worked just the way it's
supposed to. But I got a little too excited.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She watches me with furrowed brows and mixed
feelings plain on her face.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Do you think you could keep that a secret?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears she really didn't mean to let out that
triumphant whisper, and the little mistake has her
flustered.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I wasn't her trainer, I doubt she would've come
to my office to practice her tricks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not once did I ever doubt Fuji Kiseki was
anything less than a perfect entertainer. And
when I think of that...
choice_data_list: I'm so glad I'm your trainer.
I'm so glad I'm your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'm honored to hear that, but talk about
sudden...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems embarrassed. She shifts, and a single
coin slips from her sleeve.
